articles.author: Rebecca Szkutak
articles.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models - techcrunch.com
articles.description: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.
articles.content:
Microsoft AI, the tech giant’s research lab, announced the release of three foundational AI models on Thursday that can generate text, voice, and images.
The release signals Microsofts continued pus… [+2217 chars]
